name: Mushrooms & Peas for Pasta or Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in olive oil.
2. Sautee mushrooms and peas for about 5 minutes.
3. Add wine and simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Turn off the heat.
5. Add cream and half and half, then mix well (never cook cream or half and half on high heat; it will separate).
6. Cook pasta or rice according to directions and drain well but keep hot.
7. Mix with sauce and toss with half a cup of cheese.
8. Serve hot with extra cheese on the side.
